## Domain

What domain does this schema change belong to?

## Purpose

What question or workflow does this data support?

## Proposed Change

Tables, columns, enums, indexes, or policies.

## Governance Checklist

- [ ] Canonical/imported/derived/display classification clear
- [ ] Relationships defined
- [ ] Visibility/RLS impact considered
- [ ] Source/confidence fields considered
- [ ] Migration required
- [ ] Export/reporting impact considered
- [ ] Agent/API access impact considered
